title: DIY institution the VCR closes after nine years
desc: After nearly a decade in operation, north-side DIY space the VCR will shut down in April. Last week, sound engineer and musician Chris Lee announced that he’d decided to close the venue he’d cofounded before his lease on the building lapses in June.
